A.text: The range of wind speeds is smaller in the central United States than along the East Coast.

B.text: Wind speeds are higher along the West Coast than in the central United States.

C.text: Wind speeds are approximately equal along the East and West Coasts.

D.text: The range of wind speeds is larger in the central United States than along the West Coast.

parsed.answer_value: The range of wind speeds is smaller in the central United States than along the East Coast.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows that the East Coast has a wider range of wind speeds, with some areas reaching up to 30 mph, while the central United States has a narrower range, mostly between 1 and 10 mph.
